Package org.tquadrat.foundation.lang.internal

@API(status=INTERNAL, since="0.0.1") package org.tquadrat.foundation.lang.internal
The internal implementations of some general language extensions provided by the Foundation Library.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.tquadrat.foundation.lang
    Some general language extensions provided by the Foundation Library.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AutoLockImpl
    The implementation of AutoLock.
    DefaultEnumStringConverter<T extends Enum<T>>
    The default implementation of StringConverter for types that are derived from Enum.
    LazyImpl<T>
    The implementation of the interface Lazy.
    LockExecutorImpl
    The implementation of LockExecutor.
    SoftLazyImpl<T>
    The implementation for the SoftLazy interface.
    StringConverterService
    The implementation for the StringConverter service methods.
    ThreadFactoryBuilderImpl
    The implementation of ThreadFactoryBuilder.
    ThreadFactoryBuilderImpl.ThreadFactoryImpl
    The implementation of ThreadFactory that is returned by ThreadFactoryBuilder.build().
